description: Backend data contract for Activity Log page – provides audit logs, stats, and filter options.

getLogs.description: Fetch paginated activity logs with filters and search.

queryParams.type: string (optional, values: create, update, delete, export, login, logout, view, system)
queryParams.role: string (optional, values: School Admin, Teacher, System)

logs.avatar: string (initials – can be computed on frontend or provided)
logs.module: enum: Auth, Attendance, Students, Reports, Notifications, Timetable, Settings, System, Parents, Billing
logs.type: enum: create, update, delete, export, login, logout, view, system

getStats.description: Get dashboard statistics (total events, today's activity, unique users, critical actions).

getFilterOptions.description: Get available filter values for dropdowns (roles, types, modules, etc.) based on existing data.

exportLogs.description: Export filtered logs as CSV (same query parameters as getLogs but no pagination).
exportLogs.response: CSV file download with columns: id, actor, role, action, module, type, severity, ip, device, time, status

fieldNotes.avatar: Backend may provide initials (e.g., first letters of actor name) or frontend can compute from actor field. Optional.
fieldNotes.device: Can be derived from User-Agent on backend, or frontend can infer from IP/agent; but frontend expects one of desktop, mobile, server.
fieldNotes.time: ISO 8601 string. Frontend uses relative time (e.g., '2h ago') and full locale string. Backend only needs to provide raw ISO.
fieldNotes.severity: Determines dot color: info=blue, warning=amber, critical=red.
fieldNotes.status: success/failed – affects success/failed badge and counts in stats.
